title: Deathtrap! Improvised Booby-Trap Devices
authors: published by Paladin Press Jo Jo Gonzales
description: Deathtrap! Improvised Booby-Trap Devices is a instructional by published by Paladin Press Jo Jo Gonzales. Confiscated by the Munich Regional Court in July 1991.
descriptionParagraphs: Deathtrap! Improvised Booby-Trap Devices is a instructional by published by Paladin Press Jo Jo Gonzales. Confiscated by the Munich Regional Court in July 1991.

The surviving record is interesting because it shows how even ordinary-looking books can acquire a charged political afterlife. As a instructional, it can be read not only for subject matter but for the way form, tone, and circulation make a text feel dangerous, intimate, or politically usable to anxious officials.

It also matters as part of a wider censorship history in List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a. The present page is a dossier starter built from source-tracked ban records; the surviving note currently says: Confiscated by the Munich Regional Court in July 1991. More publication history, translations, and close reading can be added later.

banningParagraphs: Deathtrap! Improvised Booby-Trap Devices entered censorship debates as a instructional associated with controversy, publication history, and state scrutiny. In the current dossier, the main state objections cluster around political sensitivity.

The earliest event currently captured here is Date not yet pinned down in Germany, where List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a authorities banned publication or circulation.
